exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your estate planning forward
items: Gather and organize all important financial documents in one secure location
Create a comprehensive list of all your assets and their current values
Research and select an estate planning attorney in your area
Prepare a detailed list of digital assets and access credentials for your estate
Collect and organize all official identification documents and certificates
Create a detailed inventory of all personal and family heirlooms with descriptions and photos
